mnemonics: Please Control Harmful E-Waste: Persistent Chemicals Have Effects. (Persistence, Chemicals, Heavy metals, Effects)
keyPoints: E-waste contains hazardous materials like lead, mercury, and cadmium which can leach into soil and water.
Informal recycling practices, like open burning, release toxic fumes and cause severe health and environmental damage.
Proper e-waste management involves the '3 Rs': Reduce, Reuse, Recycle, with an emphasis on responsible recycling to recover valuable materials.
commonMistakes: Assuming all e-waste recycling is environmentally friendly, ignoring the pollution from improper informal recycling.
Believing that e-waste in landfills is harmless, overlooking the long-term leaching of heavy metals and chemicals into groundwater.
